data.title: CNGR forecasts sharp first-quarter profit jump on strong battery material demand
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from CNGR Advanced Material Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2579) ).

CNGR Advanced Material Co., Ltd. expects a sharp rise in first-quarter 2026 profitability, with net profit attributable to shareholders projected between RMB530 million and RMB590 million, representing an increase of roughly 72% to 92% from a year earlier. Profit after deducting non-recurring items is forecast at RMB490 million to RMB550 million, up about 86% to 109% year-on-year, though the figures are based on unaudited internal estimates.

Management attributes the earnings surge to robust global new energy demand and the company’s leading role in battery materials, which drove total sales of nickel, cobalt, phosphorus and sodium-based products to nearly 130,000 tonnes. Rising nickel ore and product prices, combined with CNGR’s integrated resources and materials strategy, boosted profitability in mining and smelting and underpinned sustained growth in overall operating profit, while investors are cautioned that final figures will be detailed in the upcoming quarterly report.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2579) stock is a Hold with a HK$39.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CNGR Advanced Material Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:2579 Stock Forecast page.

More about CNGR Advanced Material Co., Ltd. Class H

CNGR Advanced Material Co., Ltd. is a China-based producer of advanced battery materials, operating with a strong position in the global new energy supply chain. The company focuses on nickel-based, cobalt-based, phosphorus-based and sodium-based battery materials, supported by an integrated “Resources + Materials” model that includes nickel ore mining and smelting operations.

Average Trading Volume: 2,028,017

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

An announcement from KNT Holdings Limited ( (HK:1025) ) is now available.

KNT Holdings Limited has announced the resignation of Mr. Lam Chi Yuen as executive director and chief operating officer, effective 8 April 2026, citing personal reasons for his departure. data.title: NioBay’s Crevier Tests Exceed Expectations, Paving Way for Niobium Oxide Focus
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Niobay Metals ( (TSE:NBY) ) has issued an update.

NioBay Metals has completed metallurgical and hydrometallurgical test work on a 10‑tonne bulk sample from its Crevier niobium and tantalum project in Quebec, reporting 70% recovery of niobium pentoxide at targeted grades and high extraction efficiencies of more than 92% for niobium and 95% for tantalum. The test program, supported by Quebec government and industry grants and executed by SGS facilities in Quebec and Ontario, also showed promising zirconium by‑product potential and successful preliminary fluoride‑free extraction, underpinning the technical basis for larger‑scale testing.

Management said the results exceeded expectations and provide confidence to advance the project toward large‑scale trials, while a newly filed NI 43‑101 mineral resource update strengthens the technical foundation for the asset. If follow‑on studies confirm positive technical and economic parameters, NioBay envisions dedicating Crevier to niobium oxide production for battery and superalloy manufacturers, potentially enhancing the company’s position in critical minerals supply chains and offering new value opportunities for partners and local stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NBY) stock is a Hold with a C$0.14 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Niobay Metals stock, see the TSE:NBY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NBY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NBY is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak fundamentals (no revenue, ongoing losses, and continued cash burn despite no debt) and limited valuation support (negative P/E, no dividend). These are partially offset by strong recent technical strength, though momentum looks overextended, raising near-term pullback risk.

To see Spark’s full report on NBY stock, click here.

More about Niobay Metals

NioBay Metals Inc. is a Canadian mining company focused on developing niobium and tantalum resources with an emphasis on low‑carbon operations and responsible water and wildlife management. The company seeks to position itself as a sustainable supplier to advanced materials markets, prioritizing environmental, social and governance standards and the inclusion of local and Indigenous stakeholders in project development.

Its flagship interests include a 72.5% stake in the Crevier niobium and tantalum project in Quebec, located on the Nitassinan territory of the Pekuakamiulnuatsh. NioBay aims to leverage these critical minerals for applications such as batteries and superalloys, aligning its growth strategy with demand from high‑tech and energy‑transition industries.

Average Trading Volume: 244,797

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$12.68M

Time Out ( (GB:TMO) ) has shared an announcement.

Time Out Group has provided an update on its existing block admissions related to its Long Term Incentive Plan, confirming that 2,436,808 of the 2,500,000 shares available under the 2023 block admission have now been allotted, while no shares have yet been issued under the separate 2024 block admission of an equivalent size. The company reported that, over the most recent six‑month period to 6 April 2026, no new securities were issued under either the 2023 or 2024 schemes, leaving 63,192 shares remaining available under the 2023 block and the full 2,500,000 shares still unissued under the 2024 block, providing clarity for investors on potential future dilution from employee incentives.

Spectra ( (TSE:SSA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Spectra Products Inc. reported modestly higher annual revenue of $1.68 million for 2025, up slightly from 2024, while fourth-quarter sales declined year over year. Despite a significant reduction in net income before taxes to $87,000 for the full year and a sharp drop in fourth-quarter profit, the company remained operationally profitable and kept liquid assets above $1.4 million.

Management highlighted that Spectra continues to operate profitably in a challenging economic environment and maintains a sizeable cash position. The company is actively seeking acquisitions and new business opportunities, a strategy that could bolster growth, enhance shareholder value and strengthen its position in the transportation safety and fleet maintenance technology market.

More about Spectra

Spectra Products Inc. is a Toronto-based North American designer, manufacturer and distributor of wheel-end safety products for the transportation industry. Its portfolio includes Brake Safe, Zafety Lug Lock, Hub Alert, the Termin-8R line of anti-corrosion and extreme pressure lubricants, and Optimum Fleet Health, an AI-driven predictive and prescriptive vehicle maintenance software platform.

data.title: Skandia GreenPower to Launch Consolidated Invoicing to Boost Competitiveness
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Skandia GreenPower AS ( (DE:0RQ) ) has issued an update.

Skandia GreenPower AS is introducing consolidated invoicing across several or all of its brands in the largest grid areas, combining electricity charges, grid tariffs and any applicable electricity support on a single bill. The move is designed to simplify billing for customers and streamline the company’s service offering.

The company expects the new invoicing model to boost competitiveness by driving new sales, enhancing customer satisfaction and reducing churn, while also lowering credit risk when power prices are high since electricity support settlements will be paid directly to the group. Implementation will begin as soon as practical in 2026, with related costs already reflected in the company’s financial guidance for the year.

More about Skandia GreenPower AS

Skandia GreenPower AS is a Norwegian electricity supplier focused on retail power sales across multiple brands and major grid areas. The company operates in the energy sector, offering bundled electricity products and related tariff services to households and businesses, with an emphasis on customer retention and competitive positioning in the Nordic power market.

Average Trading Volume: 24,363

Current Market Cap: NOK213.5M

Northern 2 VCT PLC has admitted 17,238,349 new ordinary shares of 5p each to trading on the London Stock Exchange Main Market, following an earlier equity issue under its offer for subscription. This increases the total number of ordinary shares in issue to 269,386,546, with the new shares fully fungible with existing stock, expanding the company’s capital base and potentially broadening its investor participation.

The latest announcement is out from Saint Bella Inc. ( (HK:2508) ).

Saint Bella Group Limited has disclosed that, under its Saint Bella 2025 Share Award Scheme, a trustee purchased 800,000 shares on the market on 8 April 2026 at an average price of about HK$4.15 per share, for a total of roughly HK$3.32 million. Including this transaction, the trustee has accumulated 2,049,000 shares at a total cost of about HK$8.50 million, reflecting the company’s continued use of equity awards to incentivize stakeholders and potentially align management and employee interests with shareholder value.

The company indicated that the trustee will continue to buy shares from time to time in accordance with applicable laws and regulations, signalling an ongoing commitment to the share award mechanism as part of its broader compensation strategy. While the announcement advises shareholders and potential investors to exercise caution when dealing in the shares, the accumulated purchases under the scheme underscore a steady deployment of capital into share-based incentives that could influence market perception and liquidity over time.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2508) stock is a Buy with a HK$9.80 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Saint Bella Inc. stock, see the HK:2508 Stock Forecast page.

More about Saint Bella Inc.

Saint Bella Group Limited is a Cayman Islands–incorporated company listed in Hong Kong, operating through a group structure referred to as the Saint Bella Group. The company has implemented an equity-based Saint Bella 2025 Share Award Scheme, under which shares are acquired on-market by a trustee for future allocation to eligible participants as part of its remuneration and incentive arrangements.

data.title: Volaris Posts Higher March Load Factor as International Traffic Outpaces Domestic Demand
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Controladora Vuela Compania de Aviacion SAB de CV ( (VLRS) ) is now available.

On April 8, 2026, Volaris reported its preliminary traffic figures for March 2026, highlighting a consolidated load factor of 84.7%, up 0.3 percentage points year-on-year, as it carried 2.7 million passengers. Overall capacity measured in available seat miles rose 1.5% and traffic in revenue passenger miles grew 1.9%, with domestic RPMs falling 3.9% and international RPMs climbing 11.5%, underscoring a continued shift toward stronger international demand and a solid performance through the shoulder season leading into Semana Santa and spring break.

Management said demand this spring remains robust in both domestic and international markets but flagged higher jet fuel prices as a headwind and signaled it would respond with targeted capacity adjustments and gradual fare and ancillary increases as needed. The data show domestic capacity and traffic contracting while international operations expand at double-digit rates, suggesting an ongoing rebalancing of Volaris’ network that could influence its revenue mix, cost structure and competitive positioning in cross-border markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (VLRS) stock is a Hold with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Controladora Vuela Compania de Aviacion SAB de CV stock, see the VLRS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VLRS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VLRS is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial quality (TTM losses, deteriorating free cash flow, and very high leverage with a thin equity buffer). Technicals also remain bearish with the stock below key moving averages and negative MACD. Offsetting these, the latest earnings call provided improving 2026 guidance and a clearer operational recovery path (AOG reduction and targeted deleveraging), but execution and maintenance/CapEx risks remain high.

To see Spark’s full report on VLRS stock, click here.

More about Controladora Vuela Compania de Aviacion SAB de CV

Controladora Vuela Compañía de Aviación, S.A.B. de C.V., which operates as Volaris, is an ultra-low-cost carrier with point-to-point operations across Mexico, the United States, Central and South America. The airline focuses on low base fares for visiting-friends-and-relatives passengers and cost-conscious business and leisure travelers, operating one of Mexico’s youngest fleets on roughly 500 daily segments linking 46 Mexican cities with 30 international destinations.

Average Trading Volume: 841,866

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $807.7M
